Class VcsOperations

java.lang.Object
network.ike.plugin.ws.vcs.VcsOperations
public class VcsOperations extends Object
Git and VCS state operations for the IKE VCS Bridge.

All git commands use ProcessBuilder. Commands that modify state (commit, push, branch creation) set IKE_VCS_CONTEXT in the subprocess environment so that the pre-commit and pre-push hooks allow the operation through.

  • Method Details

    • headSha

      public static String headSha(File dir) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Get the 8-character short SHA of HEAD.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      Returns:
      the short SHA string
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • currentBranch

      public static String currentBranch(File dir) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Get the current branch name.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      Returns:
      the current branch name
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • remoteSha

      public static Optional<String> remoteSha(File dir, String remote, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Get the 8-character short SHA of a remote branch, or empty if unreachable.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch name to query
      Returns:
      the short SHA, or empty if the remote branch is unreachable
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • isClean

      public static boolean isClean(File dir)
      Check whether the working tree is clean (no staged or unstaged changes).
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      Returns:
      true if the working tree has no changes

    • fetch

      public static void fetch(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Fetch from all remotes.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • resetSoft

      public static void resetSoft(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String ref) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Soft reset (no --hard) — updates HEAD and index, leaves working tree.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      ref - the ref to reset to (e.g., "origin/main")
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • checkout

      public static void checkout(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Checkout an existing branch.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the branch to check out
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • checkoutNew

      public static void checkoutNew(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Create and checkout a new branch.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the new branch name to create
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • commit

      public static void commit(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String message) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Stage all changes and commit with the given message. Sets IKE_VCS_CONTEXT to bypass the pre-commit hook.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      message - the commit message
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • commitStaged

      public static void commitStaged(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String message) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Commit without staging (assumes files are already staged). Sets IKE_VCS_CONTEXT to bypass the pre-commit hook.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      message - the commit message, or null to open the editor
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • addAll

      public static void addAll(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Stage all files.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • push

      public static void push(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String remote, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Push to remote. Sets IKE_VCS_CONTEXT to bypass the pre-push hook.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch to push
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • pushSafe

      public static void pushSafe(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String remote, String branch)
      Push to remote, ignoring failures (no remote, offline, etc.). Logs a warning on failure instead of throwing.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch to push

    • pushIfRemoteExists

      public static void pushIfRemoteExists(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String remote, String branch)
      Push to remote if it exists. If no remote is configured, logs a helpful message instead of failing with a cryptic git error.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch to push

    • pushWithUpstream

      public static void pushWithUpstream(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String remote, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Push to remote with upstream tracking. Sets IKE_VCS_CONTEXT to bypass the pre-push hook.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch to push
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • deleteBranch

      public static void deleteBranch(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Delete a local branch. Uses -D (force) because squash-merged branches are not recognized as "fully merged" by git.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the branch to delete
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • deleteRemoteBranch

      public static void deleteRemoteBranch(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String remote, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Delete a remote branch.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      remote - the remote name (e.g., "origin")
      branch - the branch to delete on the remote
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • mergeSquash

      public static void mergeSquash(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Squash-merge a branch into the current branch (does not commit).
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the branch to squash-merge
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • mergeNoFf

      public static void mergeNoFf(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch, String message) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      No-fast-forward merge with a merge commit.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the branch to merge
      message - the merge commit message
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • rebase

      public static void rebase(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String onto) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Rebase current branch onto the given base.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      onto - the branch or ref to rebase onto
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • mergeFfOnly

      public static void mergeFfOnly(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log, String branch) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Fast-forward-only merge.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      branch - the branch to merge
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if the git command fails

    • writeVcsState

      public static void writeVcsState(File dir, String action) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Write the VCS state file for the given directory.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      action - the action constant (e.g., VcsState.ACTION_COMMIT)
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if writing the state file fails

    • needsSync

      public static boolean needsSync(File dir) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Check whether the local HEAD matches the VCS state file.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      Returns:
      true if in sync or if no state file exists, false if catch-up is needed
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if reading git state fails

    • sync

      public static String sync(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Synchronize local git state to match the VCS state file. Fetches from all remotes, switches branch if needed, and soft-resets.
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      Returns:
      the resulting HEAD SHA after sync
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if a git command or state file read fails

    • catchUp

      public static void catchUp(File dir, org.apache.maven.plugin.logging.Log log) throws org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException
      Catch-up preamble: sync if needed, otherwise report that we're current. Used by all goals that modify state (commit, push, feature-start, etc.).
      Parameters:
      dir - the repository root directory
      log - Maven logger
      Throws:
      org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException - if sync fails
